candidate.title: Broaden inference runtime coverage beyond SGLang

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: rg/find scan of personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/raw found existing local vLLM blog captures under raw/crawler/nccl-vllm-blog and duplicate NVIDIA TensorRT multi-device inference captures under raw/crawler/nccl-technical-blog and raw/crawler/nccl-nvidia-blog-wide. No existing local raw/links notes were found for dedicated official vLLM README, TensorRT-LLM KV-cache/serve docs, Triton model repository/batcher docs, llama.cpp README, or ONNX Runtime GenAI config/API docs. Pre-existing untracked 20260706 compute accelerator captures were observed in git status and excluded.
local_checks.wiki_search: rg scan of personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/wiki found SGLang, CUDA Green Context, Hitchhiker, NCCL, and coverage-map references, but no dedicated curated page for vLLM, TensorRT-LLM, Triton Inference Server, llama.cpp, or ONNX Runtime GenAI runtime infrastructure.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/wiki/index.md indexed SGLang and SGLang/NCCL/reference pages before this task, but did not index a multi-runtime inference infrastructure reference page.

gap_reason: coverage-map.json marked inference-runtime as partial and explicitly requested source-backed coverage for vLLM, TensorRT-LLM, Triton Inference Server, llama.cpp, and ONNX Runtime GenAI. Local curated coverage was SGLang-heavy, while existing vLLM and TensorRT raw captures were not promoted into a durable multi-runtime inference serving reference.

duplicate_policy.excluded_reason: Pre-existing untracked 20260706 compute accelerator crawler captures are hardware-accelerator evidence and were not staged, curated, or used as source evidence for this inference-runtime task.

tensorrt_deduped_paths.reason: Both local captures share the same content hash suffix; the narrower nccl-technical-blog capture is cited once to avoid duplicate evidence.

selected_sources.name: vLLM README
selected_sources.reason: Primary project evidence for vLLM serving, PagedAttention, continuous batching, chunked prefill, prefix caching, OpenAI-compatible serving, parallelism, and disaggregated serving surfaces.

selected_sources.name: vLLM Native RL APIs blog
selected_sources.reason: Existing local primary blog evidence for native RL weight syncing, NCCL and CUDA IPC transfer backends, and pause/resume support.

selected_sources.name: vLLM PegaFlow external KV cache blog
selected_sources.reason: Existing local primary blog evidence for an external KV cache process boundary, CUDA IPC, RDMA, SSD cache hierarchy, and cache sharing across vLLM instances.

selected_sources.name: TensorRT-LLM KV cache and serve documentation
selected_sources.reason: Primary NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM evidence for KV-cache blocks, reuse, offload, OpenAI-compatible serving, metrics, and runtime parallelism knobs.

selected_sources.name: NVIDIA TensorRT multi-device inference blog
selected_sources.reason: Existing local primary NVIDIA evidence for TensorRT 11.0 multi-device inference, NCCL collectives, tensor/context parallelism, and long-sequence distributed inference strategies.

selected_sources.name: Triton Inference Server model repository and batcher documentation
selected_sources.reason: Primary NVIDIA Triton evidence for model repository layout, backend families, versioned model loading, scheduling, dynamic batching, queue controls, and ensemble serving.

selected_sources.name: llama.cpp README
selected_sources.reason: Primary project evidence for local C/C++ inference, server mode, OpenAI-compatible API surface, quantization, GGUF model loading, and hardware backend range.

selected_sources.name: ONNX Runtime GenAI config and Python API documentation
selected_sources.reason: Primary ONNX Runtime GenAI evidence for model/runtime configuration, provider selection, KV-cache input/output naming, search controls, graph capture, and generation lifecycle APIs.

link_probe_evidence.method: browser retrieval plus sandbox urllib HEAD probe
link_probe_evidence.notes: The browser retrieval channel opened the official primary URLs during curation. A sandbox urllib HEAD probe for the same URLs failed with Temporary failure in name resolution, so shell-level link probes are recorded as blocked by DNS in this generator environment.
